scope: Deep static + semantic audit of CMD3 outputs + ported OLD code

summary.smell_routed: informational — OLD FROZEN code, not CMD3 to fix

rules.B1_prereq_integrity: non-zero only if first-of-chain has prereq OR non-first lacks prereq OR cross-chain prereq OR non-contiguous chain_position
rules.B7_giver_flag: giver_npc_id must exist in NPC_438 AND have can_give_quest=true AND name match
rules.B9_name_uniqueness_per_chain: no two quests in same chain share name
rules.B10_dialog_tree_structure: every dialog has 3 nodes {intro,accept,decline}, intro has 2 branches
rules.B13_orphan_dialog: every dialog.quest_id exists in quest registry

before_fix.impact: 50% of generated quests had impossible progression — prerequisite required higher player level than the quest it gated

root_cause: gen_quest_scaffold_150.mjs picked levelReq randomly from chain.level_range per quest with NO ordering. Each quest's level_req independent of prereq's level_req.

fix.approach: Linear interpolate baseLevel = lo + round((hi-lo) * posInChain / (count-1)). Add jitter [0,1]. Post-pass clamp: q.level_req = max(prevLevel, q.level_req) per chain.
fix.verify: 0 violations across all 13 rules, 3 consecutive runs produce identical SHA (deterministic)

code_smell_old_frozen.issue: `insertion_order: this.nextInsertionOrder++` returns N then increments; next line `event_id` template literal reads `this.nextInsertionOrder` = N+1. Off-by-one between insertion_order field and event_id numeric suffix.
code_smell_old_frozen.severity: low — may be intentional separation, but breaks naïve trace correlation
code_smell_old_frozen.owner: OLD FROZEN P12 code (CMD3 inherited from src/modules/quest/dialog_runtime.ts)
code_smell_old_frozen.action: informational only — CMD3 won't modify OLD

additional_audit_passes.deterministic_sha_3_run: identical SHA across 3 consecutive generator runs

delta_vs_prev_completion: +1 real bug discovered and fixed (B2), +1 OLD smell flagged (dialog_runtime off-by-one)
